full_text:
Chang Diao 常雕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chang Diao (常雕). Led an attack on Ruxu but was ambushed and killed by Zhu Huan. Chang Diao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Chang Diao lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
